EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of Admiral auto renewal for trades customers.
EmailTemplate.name: R30 - Admiral (trades)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Business Insurance Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are writing to let you know that your insurance will be automatically renewed on DD/MM/YEAR.
Your renewal will be based on the information you provided last year and your official renewal quotation will follow within the next 14 days.
If any of your circumstances or requirements have changed since you last purchased your insurance, or you have made a claim or are aware of any circumstances that might lead to a claim, please call our Client Services Team on 01242 808740 so they can make any necessary amendments and reissue a renewal quotation.
Your renewal payment
Payment will be taken using the same method and details you provided last year. If you would like to change these please contact us on the number above.
If you pay by direct debit - Your first direct debit for your renewal will be requested up to 10 days prior to your renewal, but will not be taken until your renewal date.
If you pay by debit/credit card - Payment will be collected on or around 5 days before your renewal date and can take a few days to clear.
Why renew with Kingsbridge?
- Up to £2,500 tools and equipment cover included as standard at no extra cost (with up to £20k worth of cover available to purchase). - Next business day payout on accepted tool theft claims, helping to get Britain's tradespeople back on the job faster. - Nil excess and no hidden fees on most professions covered, reducing out-of-pocket or unexpected costs. - UK-based in-house specialists, including easy, quick access to brokers, and rapid, responsive claims processing managed by a dedicated claims team. - All core covers in one place, wrapped into a single neat, affordable package attached to one easy payment.
If you have any questions regarding your renewal or the information above, please don't hesitate to get in touch on 01242 808740. We look forward to another year together.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
